column47: Focus on authentic user reviews to build credibility and offer promotions/deals to create a sense of value.

In general, Gen Z tends to make quick purchase decisions from short-form content. Consumers should be mindful because paid influencers are naturally inclined to persuade; sometimes money is wasted unnecessarily as old cosmetics expire before being used up.
